bird.name: Grey-fronted quail-dove
bird.summary: The grey-fronted quail-dove (Geotrygon caniceps) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to Cuba.

relations.subject: Grey-fronted quail-dove
relations.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the grey-fronted quail-dove as Vulnerable because it has a small population that is declining due to hunting and habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Grey-fronted quail-dove
relations.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the grey-fronted quail-dove as Vulnerable because it has a small population that is declining due to hunting and habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: Grey-fronted quail-dove
relations.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the grey-fronted quail-dove as Vulnerable because it has a small population that is declining due to hunting and habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。
